Package org.rodinp.internal.core

Class Buffer

java.lang.Object
org.rodinp.internal.core.Buffer
public class Buffer extends Object
Implements a Rodin file loaded into memory.

The file is stored as a DOM document.

    • getOwner

      public final RodinFile getOwner()
      Returns the Rodin file element of this buffer.
      Returns:
      the handle of the file element for which this buffer was created.

    • getVersion

      public long getVersion() throws RodinDBException
      Returns the version number of the Rodin file element of this buffer
      Returns:
      the version number of the Rodin file element of this buffer
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - if the version number is invalid

      Throws:
      RodinDBException

    • createElement

      public Element createElement(IInternalElementType<?> type, String name, Element domParent, Element domNextSibling)

    • deleteElement

      public void deleteElement(Element domElement)

    • deleteElementChildren

      public void deleteElementChildren(Element domElement)

    • findDOMTextElement

      private Text findDOMTextElement(Element domElement)
      Returns the DOM text element corresponding to the contents of the given Rodin internal element.

      Actually, it's the last child text element which doesn't contain only whitespace that is returned. No check is performed that there is a unique such text node.

      Parameters:
      domElement - the DOM element corresponding to the Rodin element
      Returns:
      the DOM element corresponding to the contents of the corresponding Rodin element or null if not found.

    • getAttributes

      public Map<String,String> getAttributes(Element domElement)

    • getAttributeRawValue

      public String getAttributeRawValue(Element domElement, String attrName)
      Returns the value of the attribute with the given name carried by the given element.
      Parameters:
      domElement - the element
      attrName - the name of the attribute
      Returns:
      the value of the specified attribute or null if there is no such attribute.

    • getChildren

      public LinkedHashMap<InternalElement,Element> getChildren(IInternalElement element, Element domElement)

    • getElement

      private InternalElement getElement(IInternalElement parent, Element domChild)
      Returns the Rodin element corresponding to domChild in the given parent. Returns null in case of error building the Rodin element.
      Parameters:
      parent -
      domChild -
      Returns:
      the Rodin element corresponding to the given DOM child, or null in case of error

    • getElementName

      public String getElementName(Element domElement)

    • getElementType

      public IInternalElementType<? extends IInternalElement> getElementType(Element domElement)

    • hasAttribute

      public boolean hasAttribute(Element domElement, String attrName)
      Returns whether the give element carries an attribute with the given name in this buffer.
      Returns:
      true iff the given element carries the given attribute in this buffer

    • hasUnsavedChanges

      public boolean hasUnsavedChanges()
      Returns whether this buffer has been modified since it was last loaded.
      Returns:
      true iff this buffer has been modified
